title: Need_vs_Requirement
template:
Create a table from {{table}} that would be impacted by a change request of new needs.
The table should include the impacted requrement prefix,its long name, its text, a rationale why the requirement is impacted, and which need caused the impact. 

This is the list of needs.
REQ-000149-Baseline Test Performance
The EBSD system baseline test performance time needs to be reduced from 100 seconds to 66 seconds. 

REQ-000150-USB-C Support
The EBSD system needs to support USB-C to increase performance of data exchange and communication with devices under test. 

REQ-000168-Reduce Product Cost
The EBSD system product cost needs to be reduced by 10%.
